CONTENT.Career: On 3 August 2020, after seven years with Fortuna Düsseldorf, Bormuth joined 2. Bundesliga side Karlsruher SC on a free transfer. He signed a two-year deal.On 19 April 2022, Bormuth signed a two-year contract with SC Paderborn, effective 1 July 2022. After playing one DFB-Pokal game for Paderborn and remaining on the bench in the first five league games of the season, on 22 August 2022 he moved on loan to Kaiserslautern.
CONTENT.External links: Robin Bormuth at SoccerwayRobin Bormuth at WorldFootball.net

SUMMARY: Robin Bormuth (born 19 September 1995) is a German professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Karlsruher SC.
